case_title: LUBIN,JAMES B. VS WESTERN HEARING SYSTEMS DBA THE HEARING AID PLACE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,125.00 FILED BY LUBIN,JAMES B. AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN HEARING SYSTEMS DBA THE HEARING AID PLACE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUBIN,JAMES B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WESTERN HEARING SYSTEMS DBA THE HEARING AID PLACE $1,125.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,145.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO DEFEND. RETURNED, REFUSED.
CERT. RECEIPT TO TERRY SMITH RETURNED SIGNED.
